'''Cinzero Gann''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. After [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Declaration of a New Order|declared]] his Empire in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Gann was made [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] of [[Sector 5/Legends|Sector 5]] and assumed the role of commander of the [[Fifth Deep Core Army]] based at [[Odik II]]. The Fifth Army was a reserve army garrisoning the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]], and many of its assets were shifted to busier theaters in relatively short order, leaving skeleton forces behind.<ref name="TEGTW" />

In the aftermath of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Admiral [[Malfkla Yzu|Yzu]] declared himself an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] and awarded [[Foga Brill/Legends|Foga Brill]] the title of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]]. Brill cultivated influence under Gann, who had became Yzu's political lackey, until Yzu was [[Death/Legends|killed]] at [[Tsoss Beacon/Legends|Tsoss Beacon]], a victim of Admiral [[Natasi Daala|Daala's]] mass murder of the region's ranking warlords. In the power vacuum, Brill shrewdly promoted Gann as a figurehead ruler to succeed Yzu.<ref name="DoaE3">{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-3|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 3|nolive=1}}</ref>

He remained in power as late as [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], by which date he was one of the highest-ranking survivors of the Old Empire. However, Gann held little power and was a mere puppet ruler for Brill, the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress world]] of [[Prakith/Legends|Prakith]]. His forces joined with those of [[Foga Brill/Legends|Foga Brill]] and [[Jmanuel Tethys]], forming the [[Second Imperium]].{{Fact}}
